testcase.name: test_missing_title_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration9.py:105: in test_missing_title_400 assert r.status_code == 400, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"string_too_short","loc":["body","title"],"msg":"String should have at least 2 characters","input":"","ctx":{"min_length":2},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/string_too_short"}]} E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_missing_description_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration9.py:111: in test_missing_description_400 assert r.status_code == 400, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"string_too_short","loc":["body","description"],"msg":"String should have at least 2 characters","input":"","ctx":{"min_length":2},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/string_too_short"}]} E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_missing_location_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration9.py:117: in test_missing_location_400 assert r.status_code == 400, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"string_too_short","loc":["body","location"],"msg":"String should have at least 2 characters","input":"","ctx":{"min_length":2},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/string_too_short"}]} E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_missing_skills_required_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration9.py:123: in test_missing_skills_required_400 assert r.status_code == 400, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"too_short","loc":["body","skills_required"],"msg":"List should have at least 1 item after validation, not 0","input":[],"ctx":{"field_type":"List","min_length":1,"actual_length":0},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/too_short"}]} E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
